meta.title: OT Sponsorship By Advancing Operational Priorities
meta.description: Fritz Byam identifies the roles that make effective OT sponsors (the people who can get you the needed resources and authority) in the asset owner environment. He then focuses on how to win over these potential sponsors and get their support. This session includes many lessons learned from getting sponsors for large ServiceNow projects.
